channel.title: Essays on Shaun Yap
channel.description: Recent content in Essays on Shaun Yap

item.title: Potential Solutions for Harmful Deepfakes
item.description: This essay explores multifaceted solutions to mitigate the societal harms of deepfakes, balancing technological regulation, platform accountability, and public education.

item.title: To What Extent Can Cryptocurrency Become Everyday-Use Currency?
item.description: A detailed and critical examination of Bitcoin’s potential to become an everyday-use currency, weighing its technical features, security, historical parallels, and the socio-political challenges it must overcome.
